title: ilex cassine subsp. mexicana
intro: Ilex cassine subsp. mexicana, also known as the Mexican holly or Mexican evergreen holly, is a plant species belonging to the holly family (Aquifoliolaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Ilex cassine subsp. mexicana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
